notasTacticas: No se encontró coincidencia local en Combat Manager; se usó la ficha oficial de Archives of Nethys.

habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Stun (Ex) The ankylosaurus’s tail can deliver a powerful, stunning blow. A creature struck by this attack must make a DC 23 save or be dazed for 1 round. If the strike is a critical hit and the target fails its save, it is instead stunned for 1d4 rounds. The save DC is Strength-based.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Stun (Ex) The ankylosaurus’s tail can deliver a powerful, stunning blow. A creature struck by this attack must make a DC 23 save or be dazed for 1 round. If the strike is a critical hit and the target fails its save, it is instead stunned for 1d4 rounds. The save DC is Strength-based.

fullStatBlock:
CR 6
Ankylosaurus
N Huge animal
Init +0
Senses low-light vision, scent; Perception +14
AC 22, touch 8, flat-footed 22 (+14 natural, -2 size)
hp 75 (10d8+30)
Fort +12, Ref +7, Will +4
Speed 30 ft.
Melee tail +14 (3d6+12 plus stun)
Space 15 ft.; Reach 15 ft.
Special Abilities Stun (Ex) The ankylosaurus’s tail can deliver a powerful, stunning blow. A creature struck by this attack must make a DC 23 save or be dazed for 1 round. If the strike is a critical hit and the target fails its save, it is instead stunned for 1d4 rounds. The save DC is Strength-based.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 27, Dex 10, Con 17, Int 2, Wis 13, Cha 8
Base Atk +7; CMB +17; CMD 27
Feats Great Fortitude, Improved Bull Rush, Improved Overrun, Power Attack, Weapon Focus (tail)
Skills Perception +14
Source PFRPG Bestiary
